title: December 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 17''' is the 351st day of the year (352nd in leap years). There are 14 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Rick Cimino]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Beau Smith]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Rian Johnson]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Jeffrey Goldman]] is born.
*[[1977]] – ''[[Pizzazz 3]]'' published.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 104|''Star Wars'' (1977) 104]] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Game Secrets]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[One of a Kind (short story)|"One of a Kind"]] published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 106|''Star Wars Insider'' 106]] shipped to subscribers.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 4: Alliance]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Cad Bane: Jedi Hunter]]'' [[Star Wars video games|online game]] released.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Beginner Game]]'' full game released.
*[[2013]] – ''[[The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire]]'' Part 2 posted on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']] premieres in Mexico, Latin America and Asian countries, as well as with special evening showings in select U.S. markets.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' shorts "[[When Thieves Drop By]]," "[[Treasure Chest]]" and "[[G-LN (episode)|G-LN]]" are released on YouTube.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars Battlefront II]] [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''The Rise of Skywalker'']] update released.
*2019 – ''[[The Galaxy Needs You]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[The Moviemaking Magic of Star Wars: Ships & Battles]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Jeremy Bulloch]] died.
*2020 – ''[[The Vow of Silver Dawn]]'' begins and the first, second, and third chapters are published.
*[[2024]] – "[[Can't Say I Remember No At Attin]]" aired on Disney+.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 2]]'' reprinted.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 10|''Jedi Knights'' 10]] published.
<noinclude>
